## Why

<!-- The motivation. For a new constant or tier, note why it earns its place
     against the evidence-bar rules in CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] `exact src/` is clean (the tool self-lints its own source)
- [ ] New behavior has a test (a literal + the expected finding)
- [ ] If this adds a constant: it's distinctive, and appears hand-typed in real code
